full_text:
Yuan Hong (Yanbo) 袁宏 (彦伯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Hong (袁宏), styledYanbo (彦伯). Wrote the Annals of Han, still extant. Yuan Hong was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Yuan Hong lived during the Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
